built around how to use our product or leverage some part of the product or some limitation even can be mentioned into that.

don't use Google Analytics, obviously.

Perfect.
Yeah, okay.

This is typically where we should be the first one.
Okay, okay.
That is super clear.
Yeah, in that case, I think we can brainstorm a couple of topics here and then see how it goes.
I'm sure that we could at least write a very kind of educational blog post, and then if you want to do something more technical, that would also be great, and we could link to it.
I just looked at Persistent Sandboxes up, and you popped up as number one first, and then I re-googled it, and you popped up as number three, so you're in the top three for that.
Okay, okay, that's good, that's good.
I really want to be on the number one.
Yeah, yeah, so like if you, I just, I don't know, I didn't do it in incognito mode, but I just, you know, looked it up, so if you look it up on your end.
Because I can't find it, I just, you looked up Persistent Sandbox on Google?
Yeah.
Because I don't see it.
Okay.
But probably you need to sort of do it in incognito, Nico, because on Google, you are logged in with your Google account from blackset.ai with the domain.
So you, would be, probably the search engine is avoiding the workspace with the same domain.
Okay.
Also, I had a question about the...
The check that performance for the, so it's getting better, but still we are still a bit flat.
Just wonder what are your texts on these performances and how we can improve our performances for uncheck that, you know?
Yeah, so let me, I just logged in, so the check that performance is dependent, like it's very, it's obviously depends on the prompts that we're tracking, and we are tracking a lot of prompts here.
I think where we want to, what we want to understand is where do you not show up at all?
Yeah.
And then understand are these prompts like important for you?
Because if we have like slightly broader prompts.
Where you're not showing up at all, that wouldn't be that big of a red flag as long as you're showing up for the prompts that are very, very important to you.

So I think what we can do, and Carly, mean, I think we can export the prompts and then we can kind of take a look at the data set and see if the prompts that we're tracking here, like if there are any that are kind of less relevant because they could skew the data set.
Because what I'm seeing, like just in the workspace, like overview, your competitors are like E2B has the highest visibility at 7.1%.
So they're also not like super high because I think we have a lot of prompts that are more broader, but also in terms of, so that's the first point of order.
And then we also want to take a look at the prompts that are relevant for you that we're tracking where you're not showing.
You're or you're showing up inconsistently and then seeing how we can show up more.
Again, the more we publish, especially the listicles, the product listicles, those start showing up very quickly in AI search.
So the more we publish that type of content, your visibility is going to grow.
But we do want to take a look at the prompts that we're tracking to make sure that we're not diluting the data with anything that we actually don't want to be tracking.
Makes sense.
Yeah.
Okay, cool.
And I did send over the CTAs.
I don't know.
I mean, when you have the time to set up the MVP for the banner, just let us know.
Yeah, I'll work on it as soon as I can.
Don't worry about it.
No, but I'm planning.
I'm working progress on the website, so I plan to do some updates.
Okay, perfect.
No, I think that that would be good for us.
And then I think I'm sure that there
There are ways to track, like in post-hoc, just the clicks and how they're progressing to other parts of the site.
So that would be good as well.
Yes, totally.
Okay.
I think those are all the updates that we had.
Anything else that we can help you with?
I think, no, we covered most of the things.

To be honest, my biggest concern right now is just to how we can improve our presence on Geo, especially since our audience, like when we ask, we try to ask what people are using to choose or find tools like us, and are using a lot, like by far, just CloudCode or Cursor, or sometimes just Chachibe or Gemini.
So, yeah, what I would like just is probably having maybe a plan to see what.
We can target like reasonably right now on seven days, if I take like 30 days, right now we are visibility at 1.5.
What is our objective for the next three months or six months?
I don't know what is reasonable to, but I just would like to discuss this next at our next meeting to see, okay, in three months, this is where we would like to be.
This is our objective and what it would take from everyone like you and us to achieve this objective.
Totally.
I think, yeah, that the first step would be looking at the prompts that we're tracking and then, you know, seeing what's missing as well.
But I think, Carly, I would also take this to Kyle and Talal.
know that they've been working on a lot of these, like, forecasting plans.

Sounds good.
Sounds good.
good.

a good rest of your day.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content pipeline improvements and define a strategy for AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Pipeline:** GrowthX launched V3 of its article pipeline to fix quality issues (e.g., inaccurate product info), ensuring content is now fact-checked against a product feature matrix.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**AI Search Is Top Priority:** Blaxel's primary goal is to dominate AI search (via ChatGPT, Claude, etc.), not traditional SEO. The immediate focus is on keywords like "persistent sandboxes" and "agent context persistence."](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Check That Performance:** Blaxel's 1.5% visibility is flat. The next step is to analyze the tracked prompts to remove irrelevant ones that dilute the data and skew the performance metric.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [**New Content Focus:** The strategy will shift to bottom-of-funnel content (product listicles, comparisons) and educational posts on key persistence concepts, leveraging Blaxel's upcoming "Agent Drive" feature.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Quality Control

  - [**Problem:** Previous articles required full rewrites due to factual errors (e.g., incorrect GPU capabilities), indicating a flawed content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX launched V3 of its agentic article generation pipeline to improve quality and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Researcher:** Now uses EXA (vs. baseline Tavilli) for better research on technical topics.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** Incorporates Blaxel's product feature matrix during research to ensure content aligns with product capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**Quality Gates:** Articles are graded against a rule set to prevent errors like unsourced claims or patronizing links.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [**New Content Sources:** Blaxel will provide its documentation and knowledge base to enrich the AI research process.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Documentation:** Public GitHub repo via Mintlify.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Knowledge Base:** `support.blaxel.ai` (built on Pylon).](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### AI Search Performance & Strategy

  - [**Context:** Blaxel's target audience uses AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor) to find solutions, making AI search visibility the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [**Check That Performance:** Blaxel's visibility is 1.5% (vs. competitor E2B's 7.1%) and has been flat.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The performance metric is skewed by tracking too many broad, irrelevant prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will export and analyze the prompt list to identify and remove low-value queries.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [**Keyword Focus:** The strategy will target keywords reflecting high-intent user needs, even if they lack traditional search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**Keywords:** "persistent sandboxes," "stateful sandboxes," "agent context persistence," "storage."](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These terms are emerging in user conversations and social posts, driven by papers like the recent one from Anthropic on LLMs and tools.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
      - [**Blaxel's Advantage:** The upcoming "Agent Drive" feature (a Google Drive for AI agents) directly addresses these persistence needs.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

### Content Delivery & Performance

  - [**Delivery Pace:** The pace of new articles slowed while GrowthX built the new pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [**Catch-up:** 5 new drafts are in the editing queue for delivery today/tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Revisions:** 3 articles are finalizing revisions; Natalie will request final sign-off.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Article Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
      - [The "Code Sandbox alternative" article is performing well, driving clicks and ranking high in Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [Blaxel's own analytics (Posthog) confirm this article is getting the most traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Deliver 5 new article drafts and 3 revised articles.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Export and analyze the Check That prompt list to remove irrelevant queries.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
      - [Brainstorm new content topics focused on "persistence" and "agent context."](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [Develop a 3-6 month AI search visibility plan for the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [**Blaxel (Nicolas):**](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
      - [Build the MVP for the website banner CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
      - [Update the shared content idea doc to a table format for better tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/M2DPsgpXwjjT6b7yBCX3XuDgLXxnzCj9?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)

action_items.description: Integrate Blaxel docs (GitHub) and KB (support.blaxel.ai) into article pipeline
Convert Content Ideas doc to table (idea, URL, date)
Export and review CheckThat prompts; remove irrelevant; identify gaps
Build MVP CTA banner w/ PostHog tracking; notify Aida when live
Consult Kyle & Talal re: AI search visibility targets; prep for next sync w/ Paul & Nico
